page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.32xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance belonging to the ecs.g7 server family. It is built on the KVM hypervisor and features an x86_64 architecture. The server is equipped with 128 dedicated physical cores and 128 vCPUs, utilizing Intel Xeon 8369B processors operating at a base frequency of 2.7 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each vCPU maps directly to a dedicated physical core, ensuring consistent compute performance without resource sharing.

The instance is configured with 512.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per core. It does not include any bundled local storage or integrated GPU hardware, meaning storage requirements must be met via network-attached volumes. For network connectivity, the instance delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers.

Given its high core count, dedicated CPU allocation, and balanced memory configuration, the ecs.g7.32xlarge is designed for large-scale enterprise workloads. It is highly suitable for multi-threaded applications, web serving, database hosting, and general-purpose enterprise applications that require substantial compute capacity and high network throughput without the need for local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.32xlarge is a high-capacity, general-purpose instance within the ecs.g7 family, powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated vCPUs and 128 physical cores using Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at 2.7 GHz on an x86_64 architecture. With a thread-per-core ratio of 1.0, it provides dedicated, non-shared compute resources. The system is equipped with 512.0 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps. This hardware profile makes the instance highly suitable for demanding enterprise workloads, large-scale web serving, and multi-threaded application deployments requiring stable compute and high network throughput.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.32xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 128 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and 64 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, designed for demanding enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.32xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 128 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and 64 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A high-capacity, dedicated x86_64 compute platform with balanced memory allocation and high-throughput network performance for enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 128 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores with no hyperthreading
512.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
64 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer
KVM hypervisor-based virtualization on x86_64 architecture
Zero bundled local storage and no integrated GPU accelerators
Suited for large-scale enterprise applications, web serving, and databases
